overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence beginning with a slow rightward pan across a cozy, candlelit attic bedroom with red diamond-patterned wallpaper and wooden beams, transitioning via hard cut to an exterior establishing shot of the crooked cottage perched on a hillside overlooking a misty valley village at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: attic bedroom with slanted wooden ceiling and candlelight

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera rightward to survey the dimly lit bedroom interior, revealing furniture and decor details

entered.detail: round wooden table with three lit candles casting warm flickering light
woven wicker chair with cushion positioned against the wall
wooden-framed window with grid panes showing blue night sky outside
burgundy wallpaper with diamond lattice pattern covering slanted walls
wooden four-poster bed with red patterned bedding and white sheets
small wooden bedside table with curved legs
classic green glass banker's lamp with brass base on the nightstand
wooden desk with chair positioned against the far wall
framed paintings hanging on the wall above the bed
exposed dark wooden beams supporting the A-frame ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans right across a cozy, dimly lit attic bedroom. Warm candlelight illuminates a wicker chair and wooden table in the foreground, while the pan reveals a four-poster bed with red bedding, a nightstand with a green glass lamp, and a writing desk area against the far wall. The room features distinctive red diamond-patterned wallpaper and exposed wooden beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: fantasy cottage on forested hillside overlooking distant village

events.description: hard cut from interior bedroom to exterior wide shot of the same house from hillside vantage point

agents.ego_description: static observation of the crooked cottage from elevated exterior position at night

entered.detail: tilted wooden cottage with steeply pitched roof and warm light glowing from window
tall crooked stone chimney extending upward from the roof
leafless gnarled trees surrounding the house on the hillside
distant warm lights from buildings in the valley below
dark mountain silhouettes against the night sky
dark cloudy sky with blue moonlight breaking through clouds

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an exterior establishing shot of the same cottage, now viewed from a hillside vantage point at night. The crooked house with its tall chimney stands silhouetted against a stormy blue sky, surrounded by dead trees, with warm light glowing from the window. In the distance, the lights of a village twinkle in the misty valley below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from the intimate, warm interior of a candlelit attic to a wide, atmospheric exterior view of a crooked cottage perched on a hillside at night. It begins with a slow rightward pan across a cozy bedroom, where candlelight illuminates a wicker chair, a four-poster bed with red bedding, and a writing desk against red diamond-patterned wallpaper and wooden beams. As the camera moves, the perspective shifts abruptly from the enclosed warmth of the room to a distant hillside vantage point. The scene then expands to reveal the silhouette of the house and its tall chimney against a stormy blue sky, surrounded by dead trees with a warm glow emanating from the window. Finally, the view opens further to show the twinkling lights of a village nestled in the misty valley below.
